faq.question: Why can't I watch the anime?
answer: The CHAOS;HEAD anime is by no means a replacement for the visual novel. Its 12 episodes fail to grasp the concept of the original visual novel, let alone the NOAH version.
If you still want to watch it for a few laughs, do so only after finishing CHAOS;HEAD NOAH, as the anime itself is not good.

list.title: CHAOS;HEAD
notes: Do not watch the anime before the visual novel, it's a horrible adaptation and it will ruin your experience.

list.title: Delusion of Zero
notes: A short story monologue set 18 months before the events of CHAOS;HEAD NOAH. This is available in-game as part of the CoZ Overhaul Patch after finishing the true ending.

list.title: CHAOS;HEAD Delusional Voices: Shino Hazuki Chapter
Triptych of an Abrupt Chain: Enigmatic Ward

faq.question: Can I skip the visual novel and watch the anime?
answer: Absolutely not. The STEINS;GATE anime is not a replacement for the original work, but it's still one of the best adaptations of this series.
If you have already watched it, you still must play the visual novel, as a lot of details were lost in the adaptation.

faq.question: What's the right order to watch STEINS;GATE?
answer: While multiple guides online advise a specific order for consuming STEINS;GATE, there's only one right option.
STEINS;GATE must be watched in broadcast order:
STEINS;GATE Anime (2011)
Egoistic Poriomania OVA (2012)
STEINS;GATE Movie: Load Region of Déjà Vu (2013)
With all that out of the way, you can play the STEINS;GATE 0 visual novel and then watch the anime also in broadcast order:
STEINS;GATE Episode 23β: Open the Missing Link OVA (2015)
STEINS;GATE 0 Anime (2018)
Valentine's of Crystal Polymorphism: Bittersweet Intermedio OVA (2018)
There's no other order. Don't be fooled by people online, as doing otherwise could ruin your experience.

list.title: Arc Light of the Point at Infinity
Hyde of the Dark Dimension
notes: A drama CD that takes place in the Gamma attractor field, repurposed from what was originally a Moeka side route that was cut from the visual novel.

list.title: Holy Day of the Calamitous Birth
STEINS;GATE
notes: This anime is meant to be watched in release order. Do not believe anyone online who says that you need to watch some "chronological" order. That's a lie and will ruin your experience.
The torrent includes the anime, OVA, movie, ONA, Episode 23β and STEINS;GATE 0. The order to watch the anime is in the FAQ section.

faq.question: Why can't I watch the anime?
answer: The ROBOTICS;NOTES anime is by no means a replacement for the visual novel. Despite being 22 episodes long, it's not a faithful adaptation.
If you still want to watch it, do so only after finishing the ROBOTICS;NOTES visual novel.

list.title: ROBOTICS;NOTES Side Phase: Maps, the Rain, and Macarons
One Day at Irei General Store
A Day in the Life of Koujiro Frau
The Unpublished Memoirs of Senomiya Misaki
Tomorrow in the Box
notes: An interlinked crossover story featuring the protagonists of all 3 previous mainline games. Can be read at any time once CHAOS;HEAD NOAH, STEINS;GATE and ROBOTICS;NOTES ELITE have all been finished.

faq.question: Why can't I watch the anime?
answer: The CHAOS;CHILD anime is by no means a replacement for the visual novel. Its 13 episodes fail to grasp the full concept of the original work, mostly because it was rushed due to budget constraints.
If you still want to watch it, do so only after finishing the CHAOS;CHILD visual novel, as the anime itself is not a good adaptation.

faq.question: Can I skip the visual novel and watch the anime?
answer: Absolutely not. The STEINS;GATE 0 anime doesn't replace the original work. It's actually a continuation of the visual novel, essentially serving as another route.
If you've watched it, you still need to play the visual novel because the other routes are essential to the complete story.

faq.question: What's the right order to watch STEINS;GATE?
answer: While multiple guides online advise a specific order for consuming STEINS;GATE, there's only one right option.
STEINS;GATE must be watched in broadcast order:
STEINS;GATE Anime (2011)
Egoistic Poriomania OVA (2012)
STEINS;GATE Movie: Load Region of Déjà Vu (2013)
With all that out of the way, you can play the STEINS;GATE 0 visual novel and then watch the anime also in broadcast order:
STEINS;GATE Episode 23β: Open the Missing Link OVA (2015)
STEINS;GATE 0 Anime (2018)
Valentine's of Crystal Polymorphism: Bittersweet Intermedio OVA (2018)

list.title: The Dog Days of Hashida Comima
Valentine's of Crystal Polymorphism: Bittersweet Intermedio
A Beginner's Guide to Earth Simulator
notes: An interactive guidebook that is included with several special editions of Anonymous;Code that features commentary from the developers as well as exclusive facts and lore that can't be found in-game. This can be read either before starting the visual novel, or after finishing it.

If you want to avoid spoilers as much as possible, I'd avise you to read it after finishing the visual novel, but there's some important information the game expects you to know to get the right endings. Whatever you decide will be fine.
